## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Maintenance

## Verification

Commands run:

```bash

```

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not commit real `production.env`, `staging.env`, `.dev.vars`, or secret backup files.
- [ ] I ran or reviewed `npm pack --dry-run` if package contents changed.
- [ ] I redacted secrets, tokens, account IDs, and private URLs from logs.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.

## Notes

Add any release notes, migration notes, or follow-up work.
